title: Find My Device - Play/Stop - multiple tries and exits
scenario: Find My Device play/stop tone does not function correctly after repeated start/stop cycles in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Poly Bluetooth headset connected and paired.
3. Tap the menu icon or navigate to App Settings (gear icon).
4. Tap Find My Device. (If prompted, grant GPS/location access permission.)
5. Tap the Play button to start the Find My Device tone on the headset.
6. Tap the Stop button to stop the Find My Device tone.
7. Repeat steps 5 and 6 multiple times (e.g., 3–5 times), alternating between Play and Stop.
expected: The Find My Device tone plays correctly each time Play is tapped and stops immediately each time Stop is tapped, with no audio glitches, delays, or failures after repeated play/stop cycles.
